name: Improbable M2
description: Virtual-world / metaverse SDK for massive multiplayer / events.

seo.title: Improbable M2 — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Improbable M2: Virtual-world / metaverse SDK for massive multiplayer / events.

when_to_use: Virtual worlds and metaverse events with 1000+ concurrent users
Massive multiplayer social spaces on managed simulation infra
Persistent virtual world backends for online events
SDK for large-scale shared virtual environment development
Real-time spatial simulation for digital twin environments

review.verdict: Interesting bet for metaverse-scale events, too uncertain today to recommend for typical games.
review.best_for: Publishers attempting true massive-concurrency virtual events
review.not_for: Standard multiplayer games with a few thousand concurrent players

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales alone is not HWM evidence.
